prompt:
A large water tank is initially 1/3 full. Pump A can fill the entire tank by itself in 6 hours. Pump B can fill the entire tank by itself in 8 hours. Pump C can empty the entire tank by itself in 12 hours.

First, Pump A and Pump B are turned on together for 2 hours. Then, Pump C is also turned on, and all three pumps (A, B, and C) work together until the tank is completely full.

How many additional hours do all three pumps work together to fill the tank completely? Provide the answer as a decimal.
